qa_pairs.question: How are software packages installed within the Alliance software environment, and what tools are utilized for this process?
qa_pairs.answer: Software packages within the Alliance software environment are always installed using scripts. The tools used include EasyBuild, Gentoo Overlays (starting in 2020), and NixOS (which was used formerly).

qa_pairs.question: How can the Alliance software environment be accessed from any computer globally?
qa_pairs.answer: The Alliance software environment can be used on any computer in the world thanks to CVMFS.

qa_pairs.question: How are changes and new installations to the Alliance software environment tracked?
qa_pairs.answer: All changes and new installations made to the software environment are tracked through Git.
